zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes De La Planche於1342年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆時，她的父親William de la Plaumche13歲，母親Dama Plaumche11歲。她於1354年與John Russell在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1390年在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉文哈姆享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes De La Planche于1342年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆时，她的父亲William de la Plaumche13岁，母亲Dama Plaumche11岁。她于1354年与John Russell在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1390年在英国英格兰素福爾可拉文哈姆享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Planche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from Old French blanche ‘fair, white’, feminine form of blanc (see Blanc , compare Blanch ). The surname may also be from the female personal name Blanche with the same meaning.
English: variant of   Blanch   1.
English: variant of   Blong  .

variants.name: Blanch
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French blanche ‘fair, white’, feminine form of blanc. Compare French Blanche .
Catalan and southern French: variant of   Blanc  .

variants.name: Blanc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Henri, Andre, Philippe, Alain, Berthony, Damien, Elysee, Emile, Fabienne, Fernand, Florent, Francois.
French and Catalan: descriptive nickname for a man with light blond hair or a pale complexion, from Old French, Catalan blanc ‘white’. Compare French Deblanc and Leblanc , and also Blan and White .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Blank  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes De La Planche was born in 1342, in Strensham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de la Plaumche, was 13 and her mother, Dama Plaumche, was 11. She married John Russell in 1354, in Strensham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1390, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Strensham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes De La Planche est née en 1342, à Strensham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de la Plaumche, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Dama Plaumche, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé John Russell en 1354, à Strensham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1390, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Strensham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes De La Planche 1342 in Strensham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de la Plaumche 13 und ihre Mutter Dama Plaumche 11. Sie hat 1354 in Strensham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom John Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1390 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Strensham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes De La Planche è nata il nel 1342 nel Strensham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de la Plaumche, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Dama Plaumche, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato John Russell nel 1354, nel Strensham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1390, nel Lavenham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Strensham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes De La Plancheが1342年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアストレンシャムで生まれた時，父William de la Plaumcheは13歳，母Dama Plaumcheは11歳であった。1354年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアストレンシャムでJohn Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1390年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラベンハムで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアストレンシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes De La Planche(이)가 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스트렌샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de la Plaumche(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dama Plaumche(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스트렌샤에서 John Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이븐함에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스트렌샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes De La Planche nasceu em 1342, em Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de la Plaumche, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Dama Plaumche, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com John Russell em 1354, em Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1390, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes De La Planche родилась в 1342 г. в местности стреншам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de la Plaumche было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Dama Plaumche, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Russell в 1354 г. в местности стреншам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1390 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности стреншам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes De La Planche nació en 1342, en Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de la Plaumche, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Dama Plaumche, tenía 11 años. Se casó con John Russell en 1354, en Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1390, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
